Cover image for Kaggle portfolio card

Hero.specs: Full height, animated text entrance, recruiter mode toggle clearly visible. Background: subtle WebGL or particle effect (keep BackgroundCanvas but make it subtle).
Hero.content: Shubhankar Tiwari. Systems Engineer. Bank of America. Kaggle Expert.

BentoGrid.specs: Grid layout for Projects and Skills. Cards should have hover effects (border glow).
items: Project: Indian Desi Multilingual LLM (Large Card)

ExperienceTimeline.specs: Vertical line with nodes. Left: Date. Right: Content. Expandable details.
data: Bank of America (2022-Present): Backend Systems, Incident Triage

Footer.specs: Simple, centered. Social links with icons. 'Built with Next.js 16'.

rules: Use 'zinc' palette for neutrals. zinc-950 for bg, zinc-900 for cards, zinc-800 for borders.
Typography: Use standard Tailwind fonts but enforce hierarchy.
Animations: Use framer-motion for smooth entry and hover states. 'transition-all duration-300' for CSS transitions.
Accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios. Use semantic HTML.
Recruiter Mode: Toggle should simplify technical jargon to business impact.
Dark Mode: Default to dark. Light mode should use zinc-50 bg and zinc-900 text.
forbidden: No centered text for long paragraphs (use left align).
installation_steps: npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: lucide-react, framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge. 2. Create the components in /app/src/components/. 3. Update /app/src/app/page.tsx to assemble the components. 4. Update globals.css to set the base zinc theme. 5. Ensure the 'Recruiter Mode' logic is passed down to components.
